content.speakerText: Seriously, thanks for covering my shift tonight!
content.speakerTextCn: 真的很感谢你今晚替我加班！

options.text: Anytime, you'd do the same for me.
I'll send you a bill for this.
Sorry, I can't do it again next time.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Anytime, you'd do the same for me.' 体现了职场中互帮互助的礼貌与亲和力，符合场景语境。选项1语气夸张不自然，选项3显得冷漠不友好，选项4拒绝帮助，违背感谢情境。

content.speakerText: I'm buying you dinner tomorrow, promise!

options.text: That's not necessary, but I appreciate it.
Deal! But no need to rush.
Can I pay you back in cash?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Deal! But no need to rush.' 是对请客承诺的自然、轻松回应，带有幽默和礼貌。选项1虽礼貌但过于正式，缺乏职场亲密感；选项3和选项4不符合语境，前者否定请客意图，后者将情感互动物质化。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you stepping in when I had to leave suddenly.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很感激你在我突然离开时顶替了我。

options.text: It was no big deal, I was bored anyway.
You're a legend! I'm glad I could help.
I hope you don't do this again.
Can I get a promotion for this?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You're a legend! I'm glad I could help.' 结合了赞美与善意，符合职场中既亲切又得体的回应风格。选项1语气轻率，可能贬低对方的感激；选项3和选项4语境错误，前者负面，后者功利，不符合互助氛围。

content.template: No worries, I had ___ else planned.
content.hint: 表达‘我也没别的事’时的固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：have nothing else planned

content.hint: 表示‘把善意传递下去’的惯用短语
回应承诺时的幽默表达，意思是‘我可记着了’
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：hold someone to that

content.speakerText: Seriously, thanks for covering my shift tonight!
content.speakerTextCn: 真的很感谢你今晚替我加班！
expectedAnswers: Anytime, you'd do the same for me.
No worries, I had nothing else planned.
You're a legend! Happy to help.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了乐意帮忙的积极态度
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用场景关键词（cover shift, anytime, no worries）
表达自然度：语气是否符合职场亲和力，是否生硬或过度夸张
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个标准回应中的核心表达

content.speakerText: I'm buying you dinner tomorrow, promise!
expectedAnswers: Deal! But no need to rush.
Just pay it forward next time!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了请客承诺，未拒绝或忽视
语言准确性：是否使用正确短语（deal, hold you to that, pay it forward）
表达自然度：语气是否轻松幽默，符合同事间互动风格
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个标准回应中的核心表达

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you covering for me when I was sick.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很感激你在我生病时替我顶班。
expectedAnswers: Of course, I'm glad I could help.
No problem at all — next time I need a favor, you're on call!
You owe me coffee next time, not dinner! 😉
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了愿意继续支持的态度，回应了感激之情
语言准确性：语法正确，无中式英语，使用自然口语表达
表达自然度：语气是否亲切、幽默或温暖，符合职场同事关系
关键词覆盖：是否使用了相关词汇如 cover, help, favor, next time
